name: Mahi Premium Bot
description: Telegram Premium Store Bot with UPI QR Payment and Bot Hosting Management.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API HASH from my.telegram.org

SUDO_USERS.description: Space-separated User IDs of Sudo Admins (e.g., 12345 67890)

LOG_GROUP.description: Primary Log Group ID or Username (e.g., -1009876543210 or @apnagroup)

LOG_GROUP_2.description: Secondary Log Group ID or Username for backup logging
